instructions: When the user asks about their voice transcripts, what they said in recordings, or meeting notes from Superwhisper, call the ask-superwhisper tool with their question as the question argument. Use this tool only for questions about the user's own transcript content.

evals.input: @superwhisper What did I say about the project deadline?

ask-superwhisper: Based on your transcripts: You mentioned the project deadline in recording from 2024-01-15. You said the deadline is next Friday.

evals.input: @superwhisper Summarize what I said in my last meeting notes.

ask-superwhisper: Summary from your transcripts: You discussed three action items and assigned owners. The next meeting is set for next week.
